signals.headline: Series Trajectory:**
signals.raw:
Series Trajectory:**

The Cavaliers secured the No. 4 seed with **home-court advantage** over the fifth-seeded Raptors[2]. With Toronto trailing 0-2, their path to the conference semifinals has become extremely difficult—teams down 0-2 must win four straight games to advance.

No conference semifinals matchup has been confirmed yet, as the first round is still ongoing.

Rookie Collin Murray-Boyles Stepping Up in Playoffs** | YES (confirmed) | HIGH confidence

Rookie centre **Collin Murray-Boyles has earned significant playing time** during the playoffs, with reports indicating he "deserves lion's share of minutes in Game 3" after proving his value on the court[6]. He has scored 10+ points in six of his last eight games[4].
